name: Llama 2 7B Chat
note: RLHF dialogue-tuned Llama 2 7B; 4K context; MMLU 45.3, far behind later Llama generations.

results.notes: 5-shot, reported for Llama-2-7b-chat-hf [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]

verificationNotes: Confirmed existence and 2023-07-18 release via Meta/HF. Directly fetched telnyx.com/llm-library/llama-2-7b-chat-hf: both cited numbers (MMLU 45.3, Arena Elo 1037) literally appear on the page as text ('scores 45.3% on MMLU (5-shot)' and Arena Elo 1037), so both rows kept. Note: the same page also shows a separate spec-table MMLU figure of 45.8 elsewhere, an internal inconsistency on telnyx's own page, but the 45.3 figure is literally present and matches Meta's own reported base-model number, so it was not dropped.
